meaning: adj.未经同意的,未经批准的
examples: The other application appears in the list called "unapproved".
From here, you have access to all the unapproved, third-party applications.
FDA says Bee International Distributors hand gel is an unapproved new drug.
The biotech is actually restricting Avastin sales now to cut down on unapproved use.
In fact, the biggest blow to what doctors say is evidence of unapproved use of Natrecor.
